name: Failure to Handle Missing Parameter
description: The product does not properly handle or detect when a required parameter is missing from input. When too few arguments are provided to a function, it may still attempt to read from the stack, leading to crashes, information disclosure, or code execution.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (function call sites, API requests) flowing to CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes (function bodies, parameter consumers) without a CONTROL mediator (required parameter check, argument count validation) that verifies all required parameters are present before the function processes them.
